name: v2box-control
title: V2BOX VPN
description: Connect, disconnect, and check the status of your V2BOX VPN connection.
author: vanish2000

preferences.name: serviceName
preferences.title: VPN Service Name
preferences.description: Exact macOS network service name from scutil --nc list.

commands.name: on-vpn
commands.title: Connect V2BOX
commands.subtitle: V2BOX VPN
commands.description: Connect to the configured VPN service

commands.name: off-vpn
commands.title: Disconnect V2BOX
commands.subtitle: V2BOX VPN
commands.description: Disconnect from the configured VPN service

commands.name: status
commands.title: V2BOX Status
commands.subtitle: V2BOX VPN
commands.description: Check the configured VPN service status
